markdown.content:
## Agent Internal Metrics
Buffer, flush, and sink metrics collected via `System.Diagnostics.Metrics` instrumentation.

kusto.query:
let duration = $__endTime() - $__startTime();
let bucketSize = case(duration > 7d, 1d, duration > 1d, 1h, duration > 6h, 30m, duration > 1h, 5m, 1m);
logship.agent.metrics
| where timestamp > $__startTime() and timestamp <= $__endTime()
| where instrument == 'logship.agent.buffer.current_size'
| summarize current_size = agg_max(value) by timestamp = bin(timestamp, bucketSize), machine
| project timestamp, current_size, machine
| order by timestamp asc
| render timechart with (title = "Buffer Current Size", fill = true, legend = true, spanGaps = "auto")

let duration = $__endTime() - $__startTime();
let bucketSize = case(duration > 7d, 1d, duration > 1d, 1h, duration > 6h, 30m, duration > 1h, 5m, 1m);
logship.agent.metrics
| where timestamp > $__startTime() and timestamp <= $__endTime()
| where instrument == 'logship.agent.buffer.maximum_size'
| summarize max_size = agg_max(value) by timestamp = bin(timestamp, bucketSize), machine
| project timestamp, max_size, machine
| order by timestamp asc
| render timechart with (title = "Buffer Maximum Size", fill = false, lineWidth = 2, legend = true, spanGaps = "auto")

let duration = $__endTime() - $__startTime();
let bucketSize = case(duration > 7d, 1d, duration > 1d, 1h, duration > 6h, 30m, duration > 1h, 5m, 1m);
logship.agent.metrics
| where timestamp > $__startTime() and timestamp <= $__endTime()
| where instrument == 'logship.agent.buffer.records_added'
| summarize records_added = sum(value) by timestamp = bin(timestamp, bucketSize), machine
| project timestamp, records_added, machine
| order by timestamp asc
| render timechart with (title = "Records Added to Buffer", stacked = true, legend = true, spanGaps = "auto")

let duration = $__endTime() - $__startTime();
let bucketSize = case(duration > 7d, 1d, duration > 1d, 1h, duration > 6h, 30m, duration > 1h, 5m, 1m);
logship.agent.metrics
| where timestamp > $__startTime() and timestamp <= $__endTime()
| where instrument == 'logship.agent.buffer.records_dropped'
| summarize records_dropped = sum(value) by timestamp = bin(timestamp, bucketSize), machine
| project timestamp, records_dropped, machine
| order by timestamp asc
| render timechart with (title = "Records Dropped (Buffer Overflow)", stacked = true, legend = true, spanGaps = "auto")

let duration = $__endTime() - $__startTime();
let bucketSize = case(duration > 7d, 1d, duration > 1d, 1h, duration > 6h, 30m, duration > 1h, 5m, 1m);
logship.agent.metrics
| where timestamp > $__startTime() and timestamp <= $__endTime()
| where instrument == 'logship.agent.sink.flush_count'
| summarize flush_count = sum(value) by timestamp = bin(timestamp, bucketSize), machine
| project timestamp, flush_count, machine
| order by timestamp asc
| render timechart with (title = "Flush Operations", legend = true, spanGaps = "auto")

let duration = $__endTime() - $__startTime();
let bucketSize = case(duration > 7d, 1d, duration > 1d, 1h, duration > 6h, 30m, duration > 1h, 5m, 1m);
logship.agent.metrics
| where timestamp > $__startTime() and timestamp <= $__endTime()
| where instrument == 'logship.agent.sink.flush_duration'
| summarize avg_duration = avg(value), p95 = percentile(value, 95) by timestamp = bin(timestamp, bucketSize), machine
| multi-project (timestamp:datetime, value:double, metric:string, machine:string) [
    timestamp, avg_duration, "avg_duration", machine,
    timestamp, p95, "p95", machine
]
| order by timestamp asc
| render timechart with (title = "Flush Duration (ms)", fill = false, lineWidth = 2, legend = true, yUnit = "milliseconds", spanGaps = "auto")

let duration = $__endTime() - $__startTime();
let bucketSize = case(duration > 7d, 1d, duration > 1d, 1h, duration > 6h, 30m, duration > 1h, 5m, 1m);
logship.agent.metrics
| where timestamp > $__startTime() and timestamp <= $__endTime()
| where instrument == 'logship.agent.sink.flush_success' or instrument == 'logship.agent.sink.flush_failure'
| summarize count = sum(value) by timestamp = bin(timestamp, bucketSize), instrument
| project timestamp, count, instrument
| order by timestamp asc
| render timechart with (title = "Flush Success vs Failure", stacked = true, legend = true, spanGaps = "auto")

let duration = $__endTime() - $__startTime();
let bucketSize = case(duration > 7d, 1d, duration > 1d, 1h, duration > 6h, 30m, duration > 1h, 5m, 1m);
logship.agent.metrics
| where timestamp > $__startTime() and timestamp <= $__endTime()
| where instrument == 'logship.agent.buffer.records_flushed'
| summarize records_flushed = sum(value) by timestamp = bin(timestamp, bucketSize), machine
| project timestamp, records_flushed, machine
| order by timestamp asc
| render timechart with (title = "Records Flushed from Buffer", stacked = true, legend = true, spanGaps = "auto")
